code: import React from'react';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Particles=()=>{const particles=Array.from({length:30}).map((_,i)=>({id:i,x:Math.random()*100,y:Math.random()*100,size:Math.random()*4+1,duration:Math.random()*10+10}));return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{position:'fixed',top:0,left:0,width:'100%',height:'100%',pointerEvents:'none',zIndex:0},children:particles.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.div,{style:{position:'absolute',left:"".concat(p.x,"%"),top:"".concat(p.y,"%"),width:p.size,height:p.size,borderRadius:'50%',background:'rgba(255,215,0,0.2)',boxShadow:'0 0 10px #ffd700'},animate:{y:[0,-30,0],opacity:[0.2,0.5,0.2]},transition:{duration:p.duration,repeat:Infinity,ease:'linear'}},p.id))});};export default Particles;
